personal.name: Md. Samiul Ahasan
personal.bio: I'm a passionate learner currently studying Software Engineering at Daffodil International University. I love exploring the world of code, from low-level C to high-level AI automation with n8n and Zapier.

projects.title: C System Utilities
projects.description: A collection of mini-projects built in C to understand memory management and system-level programming.
projects.longDescription: This archive contains various system-level utilities implemented in pure C. It explores manual memory allocation, pointer arithmetic, and low-level I/O operations. Key features include a custom memory allocator, a basic shell implementation, and various data structure implementations (Linked Lists, Hash Maps) optimized for performance.

projects.title: Python Data Insights
projects.description: Mini projects using Pandas and Seaborn to visualize interesting datasets and find hidden patterns.
projects.longDescription: A data science exploration project focusing on extracting meaningful insights from complex datasets. Using the power of Python's ecosystem, I've built automated pipelines for data cleaning, statistical analysis, and high-fidelity visualization. Projects include stock market trend analysis and social media sentiment tracking.

projects.title: AI Automation Flows
projects.description: Building smart workflows using n8n and Zapier to automate repetitive tasks and integrate different apps.
projects.longDescription: Advanced automation architectures designed to bridge the gap between disparate SaaS platforms. These workflows leverage AI models for decision-making and data processing, significantly reducing manual overhead. Examples include automated lead qualification and multi-channel content distribution systems.
